recent_calls.summary: Theresa called after hours to get an update on her service technician. The agent informed her that real-time updates are not available after hours but assured her that the request would be noted and the team would follow up on the next business day. Theresa did not have any urgent issues and ended the call.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting without any further interaction.

Jim called to report that the pipes on his central air unit were freezing up again and requested a follow-up call during regular business hours. The agent confirmed his address and phone number, noted his request for a call ahead before the visit, and scheduled a follow-up for the next morning. Jim declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to confirm their yearly air conditioning maintenance appointment scheduled for the tenth. The agent noted the request and informed the user that the team would reach out to confirm the appointment. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief, with the agent beginning to introduce herself before the user hung up almost immediately. No conversation or assistance took place.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could assist Gregory, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Mitra called to report that the new furnace and air conditioner installed last week are not turning on. The agent scheduled a service appointment for the next day and confirmed the service address and contact details. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting without any further interaction.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting without any further conversation.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no response from the user before the call ended.

The user called to inquire about their appointment but was informed that appointment details could not be confirmed after hours. The agent took a message and assured the user that the team would call back the next business day to confirm the appointment date.

The user, Shameka, called to request a service call through American Home Shield after a previous call was disconnected during a transfer. The agent documented the request and informed the user that a representative would contact her on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user, Gregory Lobach, called about an emergency cooling issue where the system is not blowing cold air. The agent documented the emergency and escalated it for follow-up on the next business day, as it was after hours. The call ended with the user acknowledging the information and no further assistance requested.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live representative, but the agent informed them that representatives were unavailable outside regular business hours. The call ended shortly after without further assistance.

Jessie called after hours requesting service for their air conditioner and asked to speak with Amy. The agent, Evie, informed Jessie that a callback would be arranged on the next business day since it was after hours. Jessie declined further assistance and ended the call.

The user, Jennifer, called after hours wanting to make a payment. The agent informed her that a live representative was unavailable but documented her request for follow-up on the next business day. The user declined further assistance and ended the call.
The user called and requested to be transferred to Nicole. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate person.

The user called to schedule a regular cooling system tune-up and preferred a Friday morning appointment. The agent confirmed available slots and scheduled the appointment for May 15th. The user had questions about billing related to their home warranty, so the call was transferred to the billing team for further assistance.

The user inquired about a heat pump tune-up special through American Home Shield and confirmed details for a routine tune-up service. The agent collected necessary information including the dispatch number and scheduled the service for any time after 12 PM. The user expressed interest in home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user requested to speak to a service manager, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the user gave a short confirmation without providing further details. The agent attempted to engage the user for more information but the user hung up quickly.

The user called to schedule a repair related to a home warranty and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent confirmed the nature of the request and then connected the user to the appropriate department.

The user called to confirm an appointment but the agent could not find any appointment under the user's name or number. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call. The user expressed frustration about the time wasted.

The user contacted Budget to schedule a cooling repair under their American Home Shield home warranty. After confirming the repair type and issue, the agent transferred the call to a live customer service representative for further assistance.

Danielle Frazier called to schedule AC maintenance that she had already paid for last fall. The agent confirmed her details, offered available time slots, and provisionally booked the appointment for Monday, May 18th at noon. The user provided feedback and requested to speak with a human, after which the call was transferred to a live agent.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect them with a live representative. The call was successfully transferred to another agent shortly after the initial greeting.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for their home warranty through American Home Shield, specifically for a cooling issue where the thermostat is not working. The agent gathered details about the problem and began scheduling the appointment. The call ended after discussing the preferred day and time for the technician visit.
The user called to schedule a home warranty service appointment. The agent confirmed the appointment type and urgency with the user. The call ended shortly after confirming the details.

The user, Amelda Jones, called to inquire about the status of a scheduled appointment with technician Brooks. The agent confirmed the appointment details and the user reported that the technician had not arrived or called by the expected time. The agent then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user requested to speak with a representative named CG, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the user was connected to the requested contact.
The user returned a call and was connected to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to clarify which appointment time was confirmed, morning or afternoon, and confirmed the afternoon appointment as the correct one. The agent acknowledged the user's preference and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested an estimate for running a gas pipe to a new gas stove at Ten Old Forge. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Baxter Tate, called to speak with a live person regarding an installation that took place at his house earlier that day. The agent, Sophie, informed him she was an assistant and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Joyce called to schedule an air conditioning repair service under her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the dispatch number, service address, and callback number, and informed Joyce that someone from the team would contact her soon. Joyce expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided feedback rating the AI assistant a four, requesting a live agent for improvement.
The user called back after receiving a call from Budget about scheduling. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent for further assistance and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to inquire about the approximate time Vernon would arrive, as they had received a text but no specific time. The agent apologized for the inconvenience and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates.

The user called to speak with accounts payable and was transferred to the billing team as the agent did not have direct access to billing information. The call was successfully transferred to the appropriate department.

Roderick White called on behalf of his mother, Bernice Walker, to report that the AC unit repaired last week is now running very loud and rough, likely due to an issue with the recently replaced fan blade. The agent confirmed the correct contact number and service address, assured that the team would be notified promptly, and arranged for a follow-up service. The call ended with the user requesting urgent assistance.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.
The user called to verify if the technician was coming today as they had not shown up yet. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly with minimal interaction between the user and the agent. The user did not complete any request or provide clear information.
The call was very brief and disconnected shortly after the agent greeted the user and asked how to help. There was no meaningful interaction or task completed during the call.

The user called to discuss a service request initiated by Home Shield and indicated that the issue can be addressed during a routine service appointment. The agent attempted to gather more details but the call ended abruptly before completion.
The call was very brief, with the agent attempting to start the conversation by asking for the user's service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Derrick, called to schedule seasonal air conditioning maintenance for his property at 3440 Brookshire Drive, Florissant, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details and booked an appointment for Friday, May 15th at 10 AM. The call concluded successfully with the user declining to provide feedback.
The user called and requested to speak with CJ. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to schedule a routine air conditioning maintenance appointment. The agent confirmed the details and booked the appointment for Thursday, May 14th at 2 PM. The user declined to provide feedback at the end of the call.
